## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` and it passes
- [ ] I have run `npm test` and it passes
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and it passes
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation if the public API changed
- [ ] My code follows the existing style of the codebase
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if applicable
